steps.t: The Orc-camps Uruk-gashan, Drû-garmadh, and Athmadhul are to the south-east of Mekhem-bizru. Raskwith asked you to go to the three Orc-camps in the Di…
Raskwith is in Mekhem-bizru, north-west of the Orc-camps. Raskwith will be pleased to hear that the banners have been placed in the Orc-camps.
